source_pr.title: statistics: migrate test-infra to testify for integration_test.go
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #28122 

### Release note

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: + // Add the hook here to avoid data race.
failure_signature: + // Add the hook here to avoid data race.
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to shared global state mutation: the moved serial-only integration test (e.g., `TestOutdatedStatsCheck`) adjusts global knobs like `handle.AutoAnalyzeMinCnt` and global auto-analyze time sysvars, which can conflict with other tests when executed concurrently. This PR stabilizes the suite by moving these global-state-mutating checks into a dedicated serial test file/suite (`integration_serial_test.go` via `SerialSuites`), reducing cross-test interference and race-prone overlap.
fix_pattern: Move tests that mutate global variables/sysvars into a serial-only suite (or otherwise prevent concurrent execution) to avoid cross-test interference and race-prone overlap.

evidence: evidence: + // Add the hook here to avoid data race.
files: statistics/integration_serial_test.go, statistics/integration_test.go, statistics/main_test.go, testkit/testkit.go, util/testkit/testkit.go
